benchmark_type: private local Obsidian vault; public aggregate metrics only

conditions.smart: Smart Connections .smart-env vector recall plus lexical fallback
conditions.ohs: obsidian-hybrid-search quick profile, hybrid plus fulltext
conditions.rrf-union: reciprocal-rank-fusion over Smart and OHS result lists

metric_definitions.precision_at_k: gold-labeled relevant results in top-k divided by retrieved top-k count
metric_definitions.recall_at_k: gold-labeled relevant results in top-k divided by total gold labels for that case
metric_definitions.f1_at_k: harmonic mean of precision@k and recall@k
metric_definitions.mrr: reciprocal rank of the first gold-labeled relevant result

privacy: Raw note paths, snippets, and gold note identifiers are not published.
